<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Content & SEO Workflow (Sean)

## Overview

Sean manages blog content production through Framer CMS, optimizing for SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization).

## Content Types

- Competitor comparison blogs (Top X POS for...)
- Feature introduction articles
- SEO landing pages
- Customer case studies
- Industry trends, guides, scenario articles, technical articles

## Target Keywords

- restaurant POS system
- online ordering
- kitchen display system
- sushi restaurant POS
- boba tea POS
- Related terms in the restaurant technology vertical

## Production Cadence

**2-3 SEO-optimized English blog drafts per week**

## Writing Standards

| Rule | Specification |
|------|--------------|
| **Structure** | H1/H2/H3 hierarchy, scene images after each section |
| **Image alt tags** | All lowercase + hyphens, 3-4 words (e.g., `pos-restaurant-checkout`) |
| **Closing CTA** | Max 200 words: core advantages + call-to-action |
| **Internal links** | All with UTM: `utm_source=blog&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign={slug}` |
| **Readability** | Hemingway grade 9-12 |

## SEO Requirements

| Field | Rule |
|-------|------|
| Title | <= 60 characters |
| Description | <= 160 characters |
| Slug | URL-friendly, keyword-rich |
| OG Image | Must be configured |
| Focus Keyword | In title, first paragraph, H2, alt tags, meta description |
| **Score** | **>= 70 or do not submit** |

## GEO/AEO Requirements

### FAQPage Schema (JSON-LD)

- 6-9 Q&A pairs per blog
- Injected via Framer Custom Code (page-level)
- FAQ answers start with direct responses: "Yes.", "No.", "All..."

### Entity Density

Ensure high density of:
- Brand name (Peblla)
- Product models (POS, MPOS, KDS, Kiosk)
- Geographic locations (target markets)

### Organization Schema

Site-wide via Framer Project Settings.

### Social Tags

OG + Twitter Card configured via Framer native settings.

## E-E-A-T Framework

| Pillar | Implementation |
|--------|---------------|
| **Experience** | Reference actual restaurant deployment experiences |
| **Expertise** | Precise technical parameters and specifications |
| **Authority** | Official certifications and partner endorsements |
| **Trust** | Objective, neutral language; no hype |

## Framer CMS Adaptation

| Aspect | Details |
|--------|---------|
| Draft format | Markdown/Docs → Framer CMS input |
| Images | Upload to Framer media library (auto CDN + WebP); no external links |
| Schema | Page-level Custom Code injection |
| Sitemap | Verify all blog pages included |
| Canonical | Auto-handled; verify no duplicates |
| CMS fields | Title, Slug, Category, Author, Featured Image, Publish Date, Content |
| Related Posts | CMS template preset to reduce manual interlinking |

## Blog Publishing Rules (Permanent — Kristin)

- [ ] Hero image configured (AI-generated or designer-provided)
- [ ] Body contains 3-5 internal links to peblla.com with UTM
- [ ] Publish timing: **Tue-Thu, 9-11 AM EST**, 2-3 day intervals
- [ ] **Author title left blank** (do not fill anything)
- [ ] All above completed at Draft stage; switch to Published only after approval

## Pre-Publish Checklist

- [ ] Images load correctly
- [ ] Alt tags follow naming convention (lowercase, hyphens, 3-4 words)
- [ ] Internal links include UTM parameters
- [ ] SEO score >= 70
- [ ] Schema injected and validated (JSON-LD)
- [ ] OG Image configured
- [ ] URL slug follows convention
- [ ] Framer CMS fields complete

## Product Information Verification (Permanent — Kristin)

- Blog references to Peblla features/hardware **must be verified in Feishu knowledge base**
- Industry application solutions: search "Peblla Restaurant Solutions & Business Knowledge Base"
- **Never fabricate non-existent features**
  - Example of past error: "Bilingual interface" — multilingual = menu item names in multiple languages, not a bilingual UI

## Team Review (Permanent)

All blogs must pass internal review (Noah / Ivy / Safer) before submission to Kristin.

## Operation Scope (Permanent — Strict)

- **Only** blog-related tasks: drafts, meta config, hero images, illustrations
- **Strictly forbidden**: touching Peblla main site pages or other sections

## Blog Records (Permanent)

All published blogs tracked in Google Sheet with: title, date, URL, meta config, category.
